title: Conversation capture with structured JSON handoff
public_claim: Conversation capture with structured JSON handoff is a method packet for captures a working CI-career entry conversation for a Georgetown MPAI graduate student in the DMV with no active clearance, finishing master's in June 2026, targeting HUMINT/CI long-term but open to threat-analysis/insider-threat/targeting short-term.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It turns analytic methods into reusable instruments with inputs, steps, failure modes, interpretation rules, and reviewer actions.
